title: carpinus × schuschaensis
intro: Carpinus × schuschaensis, also known as Schuscha's hornbeam or Schuscha's beech, is a hybrid species of hornbeam (Carpinus) native to Japan. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The bark and leaves of Carpinus × schuschaensis contain compounds with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to promote overall health and well-being. Traditional herbal preparations of Carpinus × schuschaensis include infusions, decoctions, and infusates, often used to treat various ailments, such as fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
